description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, defining variables CONTAINER_IMAGE as registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH, DOCKER_DRIVER as overlay2, and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY as recursive. Include a global before_script that logs in to the GitLab registry with the CI job token, registers QEMU multi‑arch support via multiarch/qemu-user-static:register, and installs make via apk. Add a build-arm job in the build stage that runs make build CONTAINER_NAME=$CONTAINER_IMAGE CONTAINER_VERSION=$CI_BUILD_REF, tags the built image as $CONTAINER_IMAGE:ARM32V6 (and optionally $CONTAINER_IMAGE:ARM32V6-$CI_BUILD_TAG if a tag exists), pushes both the original and ARM tags to the registry, and conditionally pushes the tag‑specific image. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
